proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients without `npm1_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 23.5% with `npm1_mutation` versus 16.7% without it; response-rate difference +0.067.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `tp53_mutation` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `tp53_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 16.6% with `tp53_mutation` versus 19.0% without it; response-rate difference -0.024.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `complex_karyotype` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 16.8% with `complex_karyotype` versus 19.1% without it; response-rate difference -0.023.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment for genetics, treatment, and disease burden.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear-probability coefficient for each 1-point higher `ecog_ps` was -0.0522.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear-probability coefficient for each 1% higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` was -0.0052.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher leukemia burden, measured by `blast_pct_marrow` and `wbc_k_per_ul`, is associated with lower `objective_response` probability after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for each 1 percentage-point higher `blast_pct_marrow` was -0.0008.
Adjusted coefficient for each 1 k/uL higher `wbc_k_per_ul` was -0.0003.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `objective_response`, while higher `crp_mg_l` is associated with lower `objective_response`, after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for each 1 g/dL higher `albumin_g_dl` was +0.0181.
Adjusted coefficient for each 1 mg/L higher `crp_mg_l` was -0.0008.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older `age_years` and `sex_female` status have clinically meaningful adjusted associations with `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for each 1-year higher `age_years` was -0.0001.
Adjusted coefficient for `sex_female` was +0.0032.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have a higher unadjusted `objective_response` rate than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 22.0% with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` versus 16.6% without it; response-rate difference +0.054.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `unfit_for_intensive` have a higher unadjusted `objective_response` rate than patients without `unfit_for_intensive`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 22.1% with `unfit_for_intensive` versus 16.5% without it; response-rate difference +0.056.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable model without interaction terms, `npm1_mutation`, `unfit_for_intensive`, and `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` each retain positive adjusted associations with `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted main-effect coefficient for `npm1_mutation` was +0.0675.
Adjusted main-effect coefficient for `unfit_for_intensive` was +0.0562.
Adjusted main-effect coefficient for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was +0.0542.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `flt3_itd` and `flt3_tkd` mutation status are associated with higher `objective_response` rates.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response-rate difference for `flt3_itd` was +0.002.
Unadjusted response-rate difference for `flt3_tkd` was -0.007.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage from `treatment_midostaurin` is larger in patients with `flt3_itd` than in patients without `flt3_itd`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_midostaurin` by `flt3_itd` interaction coefficient was -0.017.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage from `treatment_gilteritinib` is larger in patients with FLT3 alterations (`flt3_itd` or `flt3_tkd`) than in FLT3-wild-type patients.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_gilteritinib` by `flt3_itd` interaction coefficient was +0.012.
Adjusted `treatment_gilteritinib` by `flt3_tkd` interaction coefficient was -0.031.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `idh1_mutation` and `idh2_mutation` are associated with higher `objective_response` rates.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response-rate difference for `idh1_mutation` was +0.004.
Unadjusted response-rate difference for `idh2_mutation` was +0.004.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage from `treatment_ivosidenib` is larger in patients with `idh1_mutation` than in patients without `idh1_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_ivosidenib` by `idh1_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.045.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage from `treatment_enasidenib` is larger in patients with `idh2_mutation` than in patients without `idh2_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_enasidenib` by `idh2_mutation` interaction coefficient was +0.005.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is larger in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` than in patients without it.

analyses.result_summary: Among `unfit_for_intensive` patients, response was 30.8% with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` versus 16.3% without it; difference +0.145.
Among patients without `unfit_for_intensive`, response-rate difference for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was -0.008.
Adjusted `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction coefficient was +0.153.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is larger in patients with `npm1_mutation` than in patients without it.

analyses.result_summary: Among `npm1_mutation` patients, response was 34.7% with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` versus 16.0% without it; difference +0.187.
Among patients without `npm1_mutation`, response-rate difference for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was -0.004.
Adjusted `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` interaction coefficient was +0.191.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `tp53_mutation` than in patients without it.

analyses.result_summary: Among `tp53_mutation` patients, response-rate difference for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was -0.004.
Among patients without `tp53_mutation`, response-rate difference for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was +0.060.
Adjusted `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `tp53_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.068.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `complex_karyotype` than in patients without it.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `complex_karyotype` interaction coefficient was -0.051.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `npm1_mutation` with `objective_response` is attenuated or absent in patients with `tp53_mutation`.

analyses.result_summary: Without `tp53_mutation`, response-rate difference for `npm1_mutation` was +0.075.
With `tp53_mutation`, response-rate difference for `npm1_mutation` was -0.001.
Linear-probability `npm1_mutation` by `tp53_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.0755.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `npm1_mutation` with `objective_response` is attenuated or absent in patients with `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.result_summary: Without `complex_karyotype`, response-rate difference for `npm1_mutation` was +0.082.
With `complex_karyotype`, response-rate difference for `npm1_mutation` was -0.014.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` benefit occurs specifically in patients who have both `npm1_mutation` and `unfit_for_intensive`, producing a positive three-way interaction.

analyses.result_summary: Among `npm1_mutation` and `unfit_for_intensive` patients, response was 63.3% with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` versus 16.0% without it; difference +0.474.
Among `npm1_mutation` patients without `unfit_for_intensive`, response-rate difference for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was -0.003.
Among `unfit_for_intensive` patients without `npm1_mutation`, response-rate difference for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was +0.005.
Linear-probability three-way interaction `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` by `unfit_for_intensive` was +0.4622.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the `npm1_mutation` and `unfit_for_intensive` subgroup, the large `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` response advantage is present mainly without `tp53_mutation` or `complex_karyotype`; `treatment_7plus3` has no overall adjusted benefit and is less favorable in `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.result_summary: In NPM1-mutated unfit TP53-wild-type patients, venetoclax-azacitidine response difference was +0.534.
In NPM1-mutated unfit TP53-mutated patients, venetoclax-azacitidine response difference was +0.006.
In NPM1-mutated unfit non-complex-karyotype patients, venetoclax-azacitidine response difference was +0.556.
In NPM1-mutated unfit complex-karyotype patients, venetoclax-azacitidine response difference was +0.032.
Adjusted main-effect coefficient for `treatment_7plus3` was +0.0020.
Adjusted `treatment_7plus3` by `complex_karyotype` interaction coefficient was -0.0316.
